title: October 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 5''' is the 278th day of the year (279th in leap years). There are 87 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Vic Armstrong]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Pop Mhan]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Chris Wyatt]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Noah Segan]] is born.
*1983 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 16|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 16]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[The Lost Prince]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars: Droids'']] and "[[The Travelling Jindas]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 120|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 120]] published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', the first book in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']], published.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars Insider 78|''Star Wars Insider'' 78]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars - Force Jump Training]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – [[The Force Unleashed II (novel)|''The Force Unleashed II'']] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Queen's Peril]]'' published in paperback.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic: Showdown at the Fair]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run (TPB)|''Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run'' trade paperback]] published.
*2021 – ''[[A Vader Family Sithmas]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[5-Minute Star Wars Stories 2]]'' released in [[Wikipedia:German|German]].
*2022 – [[The Mandalorian (2022) 4|''The Mandalorian'' (2022) 4]] published.
*2022 – "[[The Axe Forgets]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' released on [[Disney+]].
<noinclude>
